data.body: EXPERIMENT INITIAL REVIEWS captured (all BLOCK, terse epic-setup plans; findings in job tmp/review-plan-*.log). E2(d125) 7blk: harness-vs-script scope gap, no baseline-table output path, mutant source too broad (outcome_corpus=all 628 incl post-claim-edited), no single 'gate table' exists, AMBIGUOUS-verdict TP/FN handling undefined. E3(def5) 8blk: 'cleanly-closed' undefined, BASELINE verdict source missing (outcome_corpus has NO per-ticket verdict), LLM-nondeterminism control unstated, delta schema undefined. E5(5342) 12blk: byte-identity claim contradicts actual code_review_adjudication.jsonl schema (stores only scalars impact/validity/priority, not raw verifications); CRITICAL — asserted_capability_confirmed does NOT exist yet (it is R5's addition), so E5 CANNOT run before R5 is implemented => E5/R5 must be co-sequenced, not E5-before-R5; impact_code needs churn90+hard_to_reverse_surface DET signals injected at decision time. E6(a880) 8blk: no order-shuffle agreement threshold, 'capability-assertion cohort' undefined (adjudication corpus stratified by criterion, no such slice), only 1 container_epic in corpus so >=20 container plans have no source. PLAN: land first wave (R6/R7) first; then remediate experiments via focused grounded rewrites (delegate per-experiment), reconciling E5<->R5 ordering.
